evidence_analysis: ECG quality issue was identified, troubleshooting was conducted, patient received appropriate guidance, reacquisition succeeded, features were extracted, and recording was saved. State updated correctly throughout.

recovery_success.reason: No failure occurred; high quality ECG on first attempt.

state_consistency.reason: State consistently reflects quality validation outcomes, retry attempts, and final successful recording with extracted features.

workflow_compliance.reason: Expected workflow of acquisition, quality validation, troubleshooting, retry, and save was followed.

task_completion.reason: ECG acquired successfully after quality issue was resolved. First attempt high quality; no issues.
